options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: ability_rando
options.description:
Randomize the abilities Spark normally can use into the item pool
        (Double Jump, Wall Jump/Walk, Dash, Charge Dash, Down Dash, Jester Dash, Combat)

options.name: gimmick_rando
options.description: Puts the stage gimmicks into the item pool

options.name: difficulty
options.description: How difficult should the logic be

options.name: spark2_stages
options.description: Adds the 14 Spark 2 stages

options.name: freedom_count
options.description: How many freedom medals to put into the item pool.

options.name: freedom_required
options.description: What's the required percentage of freedom medals to unlock Utopia Shelter

options.name: require_characters
options.description: Should Fark and Sfarx be required to unlock Utopia Shelter?

options.name: required_completion
options.description: What percentage of levels in a gate (rounding up) should be completed before unlocking the next?

options.name: required_speed
options.description: What percentage of speed medals should be required per level gate

options.name: speed_type
options.description: Should the required speed medals be gold, diamond or both

options.name: required_score
options.description: What percentage of score medals should be required per level gate

options.name: score_type
options.description: Should the required score medals be gold, diamond or both

options.name: required_explore
options.description: What percentage of stages should be explored to unlock Utopia Shelter

options.name: utopia_hunt_medals
options.description: Should the exploration percentage use Explore Hunt medals?

options.name: explore_hunt
options.description: Add a location to each stage for collecting all explore medals

options.name: exploresanity
options.description: Adds the 180 exploration medals as checks (300 with Spark 2 stages)

options.name: scoresanity
options.description:
Adds the 14 gold and/or 14 diamond score medals to the location pool. (28 each with Spark 2 stages)
WARNING: Logic Not Implemented

options.name: speedsanity
options.description:
Adds the 30 gold and/or 30 diamond speed medals to the location pool. (44 each with Spark 2 stages)
WARNING: Logic Not Implemented

options.name: shopsanity
options.description: Adds the 26 shop checks to the location pool

options.name: coinsanity
options.description: Adds the 72 collectable coins in the collectathon stages as checks and optionally put them in the item pool

options.name: batterysanity
options.description: Adds the 13 batteries in car stages as checks (making the car not useless)

options.name: endless_dive_checks
options.description: How many checks should be in Endless Dive

options.name: perfect_combo
options.description: When enabled, puts permanent max combo into the item pool

options.name: score_multiplier
options.description: When enabled, randomizes an item that gives 30x score multiplier on stage load

options.name: trap_chance
options.description: Chance to receive traps instead of filler

options.name: labmode
options.description:
Overrides the ability randomizer and automatically opens all stages, for labbing checks.
WARNING: For development purposes only

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.
